summary: World-first health-adaptive constitutional governance: rule severity adjusts dynamically as system health rises and falls. TGOV-FAIL-0 guarantees unknown rules default to blocking (fail-closed). SHA-256 chained audit log (TGOV-CHAIN-0) provides tamper-evident history of every health-score-driven adjustment. Five GovernanceWindows govern lineage_continuity, single_file_scope, ast_validity, entropy_budget, and replay_determinism — with ast_validity permanently blocking regardless of health state.
ip_claims: Health-score-gated constitutional rule severity modulation with fail-closed default
Append-only SHA-256 hash-chained temporal governance audit log with genesis anchor
Deterministic multi-band threshold classification (HIGH/BASELINE/LOW) for autonomous governance rules
